mapper.sql: select r.record_id, r.plan_id, r.teacher_id, r.status, r.teaching_score, r.research_score, r.service_score, r.total_score, r.grade, r.self_evaluation, r.dept_evaluation, r.submit_time, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, t.teacher_name, t.teacher_no, d.dept_name, p.plan_name from tea_assessment_record r left join tea_teacher t on t.teacher_id = r.teacher_id left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = t.dept_id left join tea_assessment_plan p on p.plan_id = r.plan_id
mapper.insert: insert into tea_assessment_record( plan_id, teacher_id, status, teaching_score, research_score, service_score, total_score, grade, self_evaluation, dept_evaluation, submit_time, create_by, create_time )values( #{planId}, #{teacherId}, #{status}, #{teachingScore}, #{researchScore}, #{serviceScore}, #{totalScore}, #{grade}, #{selfEvaluation}, #{deptEvaluation}, #{submitTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete: delete from tea_assessment_record where record_id in #{recordId}
